历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest science ranking was approximately 28,334; in 2023, approximately 21,560; in 2024, approximately 31,969 for Physics Category (taking the lowest group score of 501); in 2025, approximately 67,078 for Physics Category (taking the lowest group score of 503 for Nursing). From 2024 to 2025, due to the subdivision of major groups under the new Gaokao, rankings diverged significantly: in 2025, the Nursing (with Biology as elective) group ranking plummeted to 67,078, while groups like Clinical Medicine/Computer Science (with Chemistry as elective) remained around 20,570. From 2022 to 2023, the science enrollment plan was 18; in 2024, the Physics Category plan was 23; in 2025, the Physics Category plan was 28; in 2026, the Physics Category plan is 33, an increase of 5 students compared to 2025 (an expansion of about 17.9%). Expansion means slightly eased competition, and ranking numbers should shift backward (easier to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yanbian University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In 2026, its Soft Science China University Ranking is approximately 157th, with rankings continuously rising in recent years, steadily improving overall strength. Yanbian University does not appear in school reputation evaluation documents, and there have been no significant negative public opinions or enrollment gaps in recent years. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 79th, rated as 'average', indicating relatively stable application attention. Majors like Clinical Medicine and Computer Science and Technology have higher rankings among Jiangxi admissions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of Jiangxi examinees is 474,900, a slight increase from 472,480 in 2025. In 2025, the Jiangxi Physics Category undergraduate batch line was 429 points, and the special type admission control line was 505 points. In 2026, Yanbian University is located in Jilin Province, far from Jiangxi Province, making it a long-distance cross-province application, with weak regional preference factors. The Physics Category enrollment scale has expanded from 18 to 33, increasing the enrollment size.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 Physics Category lowest ranking of 67,078 (Nursing group), the 2026 Physics Category enrollment expansion of 17.9% (eased competition, ranking shifts backward), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (increased attractiveness), and the slight increase in Jiangxi examinee numbers (slightly intensified competition), a small adjustment is made based on the positive effects of increased examinee numbers and rising school ranking. The predicted 2026 Physics Category lowest ranking is approximately 74,236, with a range of 73,736 to 74,736.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Yanbian University conducts separate enrollment for medical programs in Jiangxi Province. In 2022, the minimum ranking was 22,458 (planned enrollment of 4). In 2023, it rose to 18,281 (planned enrollment of 4). In 2024, it slightly decreased to 18,982 (planned enrollment of 5). In 2025, due to the addition of the Nursing major (minimum ranking 67,078), the overall minimum ranking for medical programs dropped significantly to 67,078 (total planned enrollment of 10, including 5 for Clinical Medicine and 5 for Nursing). In 2026, the total planned enrollment for medical programs expanded to 15, with Nursing increasing from 5 to 10 and Clinical Medicine remaining at 5, representing an expansion rate of 50%.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yanbian University is a national key university under the Project 211 and has been selected as a Double First-Class construction university. It is located in Yanbian Korean Autonomous Prefecture, Jilin Province, and is a comprehensive public undergraduate institution. Although it is not a 985 university, its 211 and Double First-Class statuses are highly recognized nationwide, and its medical programs have a certain influence within the region.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geographic Location
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors have always been a popular direction for college entrance examinations, with Clinical Medicine being particularly favored by candidates. Yanbian University is located in the northeastern border region, which is relatively remote and has limited appeal to candidates in Jiangxi Province. However, its 211/Double First-Class brand still attracts candidates within a certain score range. In 2026, the significant expansion of Nursing is expected to further lower the overall minimum ranking for medical programs.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and analysis of historical trends, the minimum admission ranking for medical programs at Yanbian University in Jiangxi Province in 2026 is expected to be around 87,401, continuing the decline from 2025 (ranking number increases). The fluctuation range is between 86,901 and 87,901. The expansion is the main driving factor for the decline in ranking.
